senses.gloss: edible seeds or fruits of an acacia
to give abundant fodder, to feed
to grow pods (said of an acacia)

etymology.text: The noun عَلَف (ʕalaf, “fodder”) is the most-frequent word of this root and, apparently its singular origin, hails from a form within the root ء ل ف (ʔ l f) such as أَلِفَ (ʔalifa, “to start to like said about animals near their nourishment”) etc. as quoted there.
